difficulty.reason: Direct sow, germinates easily, self-sows, pest deterrent, edible petals

growth_stages.name: Germination
growth_stages.look_for: Two elongated seed leaves pushing up

prompt.en: Look where we planted the curly seeds -- can you see green coming up?
prompt.da: Kig hvor vi plantede de krullede froe -- kan du se groent komme op?

growth_stages.name: Leaf Growth
growth_stages.look_for: Sticky leaves and sturdy stems growing taller

prompt.en: Touch the leaves gently -- feel how sticky they are? That stickiness traps tiny bugs!
prompt.da: Roer forsigtigt ved bladene -- kan du maerke, hvor klaebrige de er? Det klaebrige fanger smaa insekter!

growth_stages.name: Flowering
growth_stages.look_for: Bright orange and yellow daisy-like flowers opening

prompt.en: Pull the orange petals off and sprinkle them on your salad -- flower confetti!
prompt.da: Traek de orange kronblade af og drys dem paa din salat -- blomsterkonfetti!

human_readable.en: Tolerates dry conditions. Water occasionally in prolonged dry spells.
human_readable.da: Taaler toerre forhold. Vand af og til i laengere toerkeperioder.

harvest.notes: Edible petals: sprinkle on salads or dry for tea. Deadhead to keep flowering. Self-sows if allowed to seed.

companion_plants.notes: Repels aphids and whiteflies. Attracts hoverflies and ladybugs.
